title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex aggregation query
poc: SELECT - 59 + - 66, - 66 * + - COUNT ( ALL COALESCE ( NULLIF ( 90, + COALESCE ( - 67, 72 + - 30 ) + 17 ), 90 + 96, + 63 ) ) AS col1;
key_bug_features: Complex aggregation query with negative values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, status) VALUES (1, -59.00, TRUE), (2, -66.00, FALSE), (3, 90.00, TRUE);
CREATE TABLE aggregate_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE status = TRUE;
SELECT -66 * COUNT(ALL COALESCE(NULLIF(value, + COALESCE(-67.00, 72.00 + -30.00) + 17.00), 90.00 + 96.00, + 63.00)) AS col1 FROM aggregate_table;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE value < 0;
